description:

title: State’s ratepayer advocate accuses Duke of overcharging customers in appeal to IURC
description:
The state’s top utility customer advocate says Duke Energy Indiana over-collected more than $89 million from its ratepayers and is set to over-collect another $86 million annually.

title: Northwest Indiana RDA approves demolition contract for Genesis Center
description:
The Northwest Indiana RDA said the $2.87 million bid from Chicago-based McDonagh Demolition is part of the city's Blight Elimination Program established by Mayor Eddie Melton in 2023 when he was a state senator.

title: Governor to name Chuck Goodrich as next Indiana commerce secretary
description:

title: The Vista at Origin Park helps bring new life to former landfill site in Clarksville
description:

title: Indiana ends summer fuel requirement in Clark, Floyd counties
description:
The Indiana Environmental Rules Board voted unanimously Monday to suspend a rule that requires gas stations in the two counties to sell a lower-emissions gasoline blend during the summer months.
